motivation: W6a/b ship-gate smoke: an UNREGISTERED sigma-60 probe DEV-SCREENED at paired dBrier -0.002446 (CI [-0.002934, -0.001958], 182 dev events). Prior tightness looks like a live knob.
disclosure: sigma=60 was peeked exploratorily on the DEV split (runs 78b90070de05e905, 7db571441ce74076) before this registration. Dev is the screening set, so the peek inflates dev-selection optimism only; the HOLDOUT remains untouched by any member of this family and is the sole adoption evidence (spec 5.2/5.3).
protocol: All variants replay the dev split through run_replay; select_nominee picks at most ONE nominee (best dev mean among DEV-SCREENED); the holdout confirmation run requires an explicit go from Will (first burn of the reserve) and --nominee-from the dev run id.
